user.title: WLED Segment Controller
user.description: This integration adds per-segment effect control to your WLED devices. Click Submit to enable.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is needed.

apply_effect.name: Apply Effect
apply_effect.description: Apply an effect to a specific WLED segment with optional auto-restore.

segment.name: Segment
segment.description: Segment name or ID to apply the effect to.

color.name: Color
color.description: Color as hex string (#RRGGBB) or RGB array [R, G, B].

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Duration in seconds before auto-restoring the previous state.

restore_segment.name: Restore Segment
restore_segment.description: Manually restore a segment to its saved state before the last effect was applied.

segment.name: Segment
segment.description: Segment name or ID to restore.

save_state.name: Save State
save_state.description: Save the current state of all segments as a named snapshot.

name.name: Name
name.description: Name for the saved state snapshot.

restore_state.name: Restore State
restore_state.description: Restore a previously saved named state snapshot.

name.name: Name
name.description: Name of the saved state snapshot to restore.
